summary: Most core UI requirements appear implemented: SPA navigation across five sections with active highlighting, reusable hero component using local floral hero image, per-section comments UI wired to backend, contact form with validation/success state, Google Translate widget container/script loader, and SEO metadata in frontend/index.html. However, required generated static image assets are not shown as added, and some extra authentication/contact-retrieval plumbing was added beyond the request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and include required static images in the app under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (hero image and optional background pattern) instead of hotlinking external images.
missing_requirements.reason: The code references local assets under /assets/generated (hero and background pattern), but the diff summary does not show any new files added under frontend/public/assets/generated, which is explicitly required by the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication context/hooks and actor recreation logic added (login/identity management) despite authentication not being required for this build.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request login/authentication; it only restricts providers if authentication is later needed. The diff adds a full Internet Identity provider/hook stack.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend API to retrieve contact messages (getContactMessages) implemented.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 requires persisting contact submissions and showing UI success state, but does not request any endpoint to list/retrieve stored messages.
